summary: ThreeDScene: Klein bottle immersed in ℝ³ via standard parametrization with u, v ∈ [0, 2π]. ValueTracker u_max_tr grows surface from 0 → 2π via always_redraw Surface with BLUE-TEAL-ORANGE gradient. Camera ambient rotation shows self-intersection (handle through wall). Non-orientable, no boundary; embeds in ℝ⁴.
